title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Vijay Sales

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Vijay Sales
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
